name: claude-grocery
description: Plan weekly meals, generate smart shopping lists, and order from King Soopers, Safeway (Instacart), or Walmart. Built for Colorado.
long_description: Claude Grocery helps you plan a full week of meals for your household, automatically generates consolidated grocery lists with ingredient deduplication and unit normalization, estimates costs using real store pricing, and connects directly to King Soopers (Kroger API), Safeway (via Instacart), or Walmart for seamless ordering. Supports dietary restrictions, allergies, household sizing, pantry staple management, and budget tracking.

zip_code.title: ZIP Code
zip_code.description: Your Colorado ZIP code for finding nearby stores

kroger_client_id.title: Kroger Client ID
kroger_client_id.description: Client ID from developer.kroger.com (free). Required for King Soopers integration.

instacart_api_key.title: Instacart API Key
instacart_api_key.description: API key from Instacart Developer Platform. Required for Safeway and other Instacart-supported stores.

walmart_affiliate_id.title: Walmart Affiliate ID (Optional)
walmart_affiliate_id.description: Impact Radius affiliate tag for Walmart links
